Eileen Ryan (doğum adıyla Eileen Annucci), 16 Ekim 1927 tarihinde New York City, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. İrlandalı bir anne ve İtalyan-Amerikan bir babanın kızıdır. Oyunculuk kariyerine 1950'lerin başında New York tiyatro sahnelerinde başladı ve 1953 yılında "Sing Till Tomorrow" adlı oyunla Broadway'deki ilk çıkışını yaptı. 1957 yılında, "The Iceman Cometh" oyununun provaları sırasında tanıştığı yönetmen ve aktör Leo Penn ile evlendi ve bu evlilikten müzisyen Michael Penn ile aktörler Sean Penn ve Chris Penn dünyaya geldi.

Televizyonun "Altın Çağı"nda "The Twilight Zone", "Bonanza", "Ben Casey" ve "Little House on the Prairie" gibi dönemin popüler dizilerinde konuk oyuncu olarak yer aldı. Çocuklarını büyütmek için kariyerine uzun bir ara veren Ryan, 1980'lerin ortalarında oyunculuğa daha aktif bir şekilde geri döndü.

Sinemadaki en unutulmaz rollerinden birini, gerçek hayattaki oğulları Sean ve Chris Penn ile birlikte rol aldığı 1986 yapımı "At Close Range" (Yakın Mesafe) filminde, onların büyükannesini canlandırarak gerçekleştirdi. Kariyeri boyunca sık sık ailesinin projelerinde yer aldı; oğlu Sean Penn'in yönettiği "The Indian Runner" (1991), "The Crossing Guard" (1995) ve "The Pledge" (2001) filmlerinde rol aldı. Diğer önemli filmleri arasında "Parenthood" (1989), "Benny & Joon" (1993), "Magnolia" (1999) ve "Feast" (2005) bulunmaktadır.

Eileen Ryan, 9 Ekim 2022 tarihinde, 95. doğum gününe sadece bir hafta kala, Malibu, Kaliforniya'daki evinde 94 yaşında vefat etti.

Im Soo-jung (Hangul: 임수정; born on July 11, 1979) is a South Korean actress. She has since appeared in numerous films, notably Park Chan-wook's I'm a Cyborg, But That's OK (2006), Hur Jin-ho's Happiness (2007), Lee Yoon-ki's Come Rain, Come Shine (2011), and Min Kyu-dong's All About My Wife (for which she won Best Actress at the 2012 Blue Dragon Film Awards).

Joanna Pacula (born January 2, 1957) is a Polish actress. Pacula joined Warsaw Dramatic Theatre where she acted until 1981. She started her career playing in productions of Shakespeare's Romeo and Juliet, Othello and As You Like It. She also found work in a handful of films, including Krzysztof Zanussi's Barwy ochronne/Camouflage (1977). In 1981, Pacula was caught in Paris when communist authorities in Poland declared martial law. In 1982 she eventually emigrated to the U.S. where she has specialized in playing European temptresses since her feature debut opposite William Hurt in Gorky Park (1983). She played the part of the exotic beauty in numerous American TV series and movies, including the Holocaust drama Escape From Sobibor (CBS, 1987), The Kiss (1988), E.A.R.T.H. Force (CBS, 1990), and the TV series, The Colony (ABC, 1996). She was featured in Marked for Death (1990) as an expert on Jamaican voodoo and gangs; in the Italian erotic thriller Husbands And Lovers (1992) as a free spirited adultress (which featured a rather controversial bare-bottom spanking scene, a first in a mainstream film); Tombstone (1993) as Doc Holliday's lover, Kate (also known as Big Nose Kate and Mary Catherine Haroney, born November 7, 1850); in The Haunted Sea (1997); and in the movie Virus (1999), playing a Russian scientist. She currently resides in Southern California.

Joanna Pacuła (* 2. Januar 1957 in Tomaszów Lubelski, Polen) ist eine polnisch-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Pacuła absolvierte die Theaterhochschule Akademia Teatralna im. Aleksandra Zelwerowicza (damals Państwowa Wyższa Szkoła Teatralna) in Warschau. In den Jahren 1979 bis 1981 trat sie im Dramatischen Theater Warschau auf.

Ihre erste Rolle in einem Kinofilm spielte Pacuła in Tarnfarben (1977) von Krzysztof Zanussi. Sie war ebenfalls in Fernsehserien zu sehen.

Als am 13. Dezember 1981 in Polen das Kriegsrecht verkündet wurde, hielt sich Pacuła in Paris auf. Sie freundete sich dort mit Roman Polański an, der ihr einige Aufträge als Fotomodell verschaffte. Bilder von ihr wurden auf den Titelseiten der Zeitschriften wie Cosmopolitan, Harper’s Bazaar und Vogue veröffentlicht.

Im Jahr 1982 reiste Pacuła in die USA, wo sie dauerhaft blieb. Für ihre Rolle im Thriller Gorky Park (1983), in dem sie an der Seite von William Hurt, Lee Marvin und Brian Dennehy spielte, wurde sie im Jahr 1984 für den Golden Globe Award nominiert. Für ihre Hauptrolle im Horrorfilm Der Kuss (1988) wurde sie 1990 für den Saturn Award nominiert. Im Filmdrama Männer und Liebhaber (1992) übernahm sie neben Julian Sands eine der Hauptrollen. Im Familienfilm No Place Like Home (2001) ist sie neben Judge Reinhold zu sehen, im Actionfilm The Cutter (2005) spielte sie an der Seite von Chuck Norris.

data.biography: Seu Jorge (born June 8, 1970) is a Brazilian musician, singer/songwriter and actor. Born Jorge Mário da Silva, he was raised in a favela in the city of Belford Roxo in the Baixada Fluminense region of Rio de Janeiro state. He is considered by his fans a renewer of Brazilian pop samba. Seu Jorge cites samba school, and American soul singer Stevie Wonder as major musical influences. Seu Jorge has gained exposure through his work as an actor and soundtrack composer. He appeared in the critically acclaimed film City of God as Mané Galinha, and then played Pelé Dos Santos in Wes Anderson's The Life Aquatic with Steve Zissou, for which he provided much of the soundtrack in the form of Portuguese language cover versions of David Bowie classics.
data.name: Seu Jorge

data.biography:
Seu Jorge, nome artístico de Jorge Mário da Silva é um ator, cantor, compositor e multi-instrumentista brasileiro de MPB, R&B, samba e soul.

Primogênito de quatro filhos (os outros são Charles, Vitório e Rogério), Seu Jorge teve uma infância dura mas tranquila no bairro Gogó da Ema, em Belford Roxo. Começou a trabalhar com dez anos de idade em uma borracharia, primeira de várias ocupações como contínuo, marceneiro e descascador de batatas em um bar. Serviu ao Exército Brasileiro em 1989-1990, no Rio de Janeiro, no Depósito Central de Armamento - DCArmt, fez curso de corneteiro militar no 2º Batalhão de Infantaria Motorizado Escola (Regimento AVAÍ), mas não se adaptou à vida militar, sendo licenciado em janeiro de 1990.

As variadas profissões nunca ofuscaram o seu verdadeiro desejo de se tornar músico. Desde adolescente, frequentava as rodas de samba cariocas acompanhando o pai e os irmãos em bailes funks e bailes charmes da periferia, e cedo começou a se profissionalizar cantando na noite. Foi aí que a morte de seu irmão Vitório em uma chacina levou a família à desestruturação, e Seu Jorge acabou virando sem-teto por cerca de três anos. A virada se deu quando o clarinetista Paulo Moura o convidou para fazer um teste para um musical de teatro. Foi aprovado e acabou participando de mais de 20 espetáculos com o Teatro da Universidade do Rio de Janeiro, como cantor e ator.

Além da carreira musical, Seu Jorge é um dos donos da cervejaria Karavelle e de dois bares na cidade de São Paulo.
data.name: Seu Jorge

data.biography: Seu Jorge（1970 年 6 月 8 日出生）是巴西音乐家、歌手/词曲作者和演员。他出生于豪尔赫·马里奥·达席尔瓦，在里约热内卢州拜萨达弗鲁米嫩塞地区贝尔福德罗克索市的一个贫民窟长大。他被他的粉丝认为是巴西流行桑巴舞的更新者。Seu Jorge 引用了桑巴舞学校和美国灵魂歌手 Stevie Wonder 作为主要的音乐影响。Seu Jorge 通过他作为演员和配乐作曲家的工作获得了曝光。他出演了广受好评的电影《上帝之城》，饰演马内·加利尼亚，然后在韦斯·安德森的《水生生物》中与史蒂夫·齐苏一起扮演贝利·多斯桑托斯，为此他以大卫·鲍伊经典的葡萄牙语翻唱版本的形式提供了大部分配乐。

塞烏·喬奇（1970 年 6 月 8 日出生）是巴西音樂家、歌手/詞曲作者和演員。他出生於豪爾赫·馬里奧·達席爾瓦，在里約熱內盧州拜薩達弗魯米嫩塞地區貝爾福德羅克索市的一個貧民窟長大。他被他的粉絲認為是巴西流行桑巴舞的更新者。塞烏·喬奇 引用了桑巴舞學校和美國靈魂歌手 Stevie Wonder 作為主要的音樂影響。塞烏·喬奇 透過 透過 通過他作為演員和配樂作曲家的工作獲得了曝光。他出演了廣受好評的電影《無主之城》，飾演馬內·加利尼亞，然後在韋斯·安德森的《水生生物》中與史蒂夫·齊蘇一起扮演貝利·多斯桑託斯，為此他以大衞·鮑伊經典的葡萄牙語翻唱版本的形式提供了大部分配樂。
data.name: 塞烏·喬奇

data.biography: Merxat Yalkun, also known as Mi Re, is a Chinese actor and model of Uyghur ethnicity. Born on July 20, 1991, in Ürümqi, Xinjiang, China, he pursued acting from an early age and graduated from the Shanghai Theatre Academy in 2014. Merxat began his career as a fashion model before transitioning to acting. He gained recognition for his role in the historical comedy drama Cosmetology High in 2014 and has since appeared in numerous dramas, including Winter Begonia, Legend of Yunxi, and Falling Into Your Smile.
data.name: Merxat

米热，1991年7月20日出生于新疆维吾尔自治区乌鲁木齐市，中国内地男演员，毕业于上海戏剧学院2010级表演系。

2013年，米热参加自由质在——Q库宁哲亚洲型男大赛并晋级10强。2014年1月，首次参演电视剧《班淑传奇》；3月，参演电视剧《遇见爱情的利先生》；7月，在周播剧《美人制造》饰演美男子张易之而获得关注。2016年参演电视剧《半妖倾城》、《美人为馅》。2017年主演电视剧《云巅之上》。2018年主演电视剧《凤囚凰》、《芸汐传》。2019年，特别出演的电视剧《请赐我一双翅膀》播出，米热饰演千面神偷萧临风，一生默默守护鞠婧祎饰演的林九歌，与鞠婧祎再续前缘。2020年，米热参演的《鬓边不是海棠红》播出，该剧以独特的视角，还原了民国动荡岁月中最真实的京风国韵和家国情怀。2020年，由米热主演的古装励志“甜辣”爱情剧《替嫁医女》热播，饰演宇文邕。

2022年2月2日，参加《百花迎春》晚会，与刘耀文等人共同演唱歌曲《青春走在新征程》。
data.name: 米热

data.biography:
Anthony Robert McMillan OBE (March 30, 1950 – October 14, 2022), known professionally as Robbie Coltrane, was a Scottish actor and comedian. He gained worldwide recognition as Rubeus Hagrid in the Harry Potter film series (2001–2011), and as Valentin Dmitrovich Zukovsky in the James Bond films GoldenEye (1995) and The World Is Not Enough (1999). He was appointed an OBE in the 2006 New Year Honours by Queen Elizabeth II for his services to drama. In 1990, Coltrane received the Evening Standard British Film Award – Peter Sellers Award for Comedy. In 2011, he was honoured for his "outstanding contribution" to film at the British Academy Scotland Awards.

Coltrane started his career appearing alongside Hugh Laurie, Stephen Fry, and Emma Thompson in the sketch series Alfresco (1983–1984). In 1987, he starred in the BBC miniseries Tutti Frutti alongside Thompson, for which he received his first British Academy Television Award for Best Actor nomination. Coltrane then gained national prominence starring as criminal psychologist Dr. Eddie "Fitz" Fitzgerald in the ITV television series Cracker (1993–2006), a role which saw him receive the British Academy Television Award for Best Actor in three consecutive years (1994 to 1996). In 2006, Coltrane came eleventh in ITV's poll of TV's 50 Greatest Stars, voted by the public. In 2016 he starred in the four-part Channel 4 series National Treasure alongside Julie Walters, a role for which he received a British Academy Television Award nomination.

Coltrane appeared in two films for George Harrison's Handmade Films: the Neil Jordan neo-noir Mona Lisa (1986) with Bob Hoskins, and Nuns on the Run with Eric Idle. He also appeared in Kenneth Branagh's Shakespeare adaptation Henry V (1989), the comedy Let It Ride (1989), Roald Dahl's Danny, the Champion of the World (1989), Steven Soderbergh's crime-comedy thriller Ocean's Twelve (2004), Rian Johnson's caper film The Brothers Bloom (2008), Mike Newell's Dickens film adaptation Great Expectations (2012), and Emma Thompson's biographical film Effie Gray (2014). He was also known for his voice performances in the animated films The Tale of Despereaux (2008), and Pixar's Brave (2012).
data.name: Robbie Coltrane

data.biography:
Robbie Coltrane, OBE; eigentlich Anthony Robert McMillan (* 30. März 1950 in Rutherglen, South Lanarkshire, Schottland;  † 14. Oktober 2022 in Larbert) war ein britischer Schauspieler.

Seinen Durchbruch als Bühnenschauspieler erlebte er 1978 mit dem Stück The Slab Boys des schottischen Dramatikers John Byrne am Traverse Theatre in Edinburgh[2]. Seinen ersten Fernsehauftritt hatte er 1980 als Border Guard in der BBC-Miniserie The Lost Tribe. Anfang der 1980er Jahre wirkte er in den Comedy-Serien The Comic Strip Presents, Blackadder und Saturday Night Live mit. Für Tutti Frutti erhielt er eine BAFTA-Nominierung.

Von 1993 bis 2006 verkörperte er in der Krimiserie Für alle Fälle Fitz (Cracker) die Titelrolle. Die beim Publikum und bei Kritikern sehr beliebte Serie wurde mit zahlreichen Preisen ausgezeichnet. Coltrane erhielt für seine Darstellung des Polizeipsychologen „Fitz“ Fitzgerald drei Jahre in Folge einen BAFTA als bester Fernsehdarsteller. In dem US-Remake Immer wieder Fitz wirkte er 1998 in der Episode Weiße Teufel (White Ghost) als Gaststar mit.

1995 war er in dem James-Bond-Film GoldenEye als ehemaliger KGB-Agent Valentin Dimitrovich Zukovsky zu sehen; eine Rolle, die er 1999 noch einmal in James Bond 007 – Die Welt ist nicht genug übernahm. Coltranes internationale Bekanntheit steigerte sich danach durch seine Mitwirkung in den acht Verfilmungen der Harry-Potter-Romane, in denen er über den Zeitraum von 2001 bis 2011 jeweils den Halbriesen Rubeus Hagrid darstellte.

Robbie Coltrane starb im Oktober 2022 nach langer Krankheit im Alter von 72 Jahren im schottischen Larbert an Multiorganversagen.

Quelle : Wikipedia

罗彼·考特拉尼，英国演员，毕业于格拉斯哥艺术学校，主修美术和电影学，他特有的英伦帅男气质使他很快进入到好莱坞发展，可以出演了很多部007影片，后来也成为了《哈利·波特》系列的主要演员之一。扮演了霍格沃茨深受欢迎的看守鲁伯·海格，这位保护神奇生物课的老师也是哈利、罗恩和赫敏的好朋友。

　　考特拉尼是英国最多产且最受尊敬的影视演员之一，他在逾三十年的演艺生涯中多次获奖。迄今为止，他在一段辉煌的电影生涯中曾出演过40多部电影，包括最近在《十二罗汉》中扮演松井。当然他也参演《哈利·波特与魔法石》、《哈利·波特与密室》、《哈利·波特与火焰杯》、《哈利·波特与凤凰社》、《哈利·波特与混血王子》、《哈利·波特与死亡圣器（上）》、《哈利·波特与死亡圣器（下）》。他曾凭《哈利·波特与魔法石》获得过英国电影电视艺术学院奖和伦敦影评人协会奖的最佳配角提名，并获得过苏格兰电影最佳男演员奖。客串黑爵士第三季中的一个角色.

data.biography:
Anthony Robert McMillan (30 de marzo de 1950), más conocido como Robbie Coltrane, es un actor escocés de cine y televisión. Es famoso por sus apariciones como Rubeus Hagrid en las películas de Harry Potter, como Valentin Dmitrovich Zukovsky en las películas de James Bond GoldenEye (1995) y El mundo nunca es suficiente (1999), y como el Dr. Eddie «Fitz» Fitzgerald en la serie televisiva británica Cracker, durante los años 1990.

Durante los años 70, adoptó su nombre artístico en honor al saxofonista John Coltrane. Además, en este mismo periodo comenzó a trabajar como actor de teatro y como comediante en vivo. Obtuvo fama como cómico en clubes nocturnos, usualmente trabajando en grupos ya formados, siendo la actriz Emma Thompson una de sus compañeras.

Anthony Robert McMillan, dit Robbie Coltrane, né le 30 mars 1950 à Rutherglen (Écosse) et mort le 14 octobre 2022 à Larbert (en) (Écosse), est un acteur britannique.

Il est notamment connu pour les rôles de Rubeus Hagrid dans la série de films Harry Potter et de Valentin Zukovsky dans la franchise James Bond. Il est nommé en 2006 dans l'ordre de l'Empire britannique.

Anthony Robert McMillan (30 marzo 1950-14 ottobre 2022), conosciuto professionalmente come Robbie Coltrane, era un attore e comico scozzese. Ha ottenuto il riconoscimento mondiale come Rubeus Hagrid nella serie di film di Harry Potter (2001-2011) e come Valentin Dmitrovich Zukovsky nei film di James Bond GoldenEye (1995) e The World Is Not Enough (1999). È stato nominato OBE nel 2006 New Year Honours dalla regina Elisabetta II per i suoi servizi al dramma. Nel 1990, Coltrane ha ricevuto l'Evening Standard British Film Award – Peter Sellers Award per la commedia. Nel 2011, è stato premiato per il suo "eccezionale contributo" al cinema ai British Academy Scotland Awards.

Coltrane ha iniziato la sua carriera apparendo al fianco di Hugh Laurie, Stephen Fry ed Emma Thompson nella serie di sketch Alfresco (1983-1984). Nel 1987, ha recitato nella miniserie della BBC Tutti Frutti al fianco di Thompson, per la quale ha ricevuto la sua prima candidatura al British Academy Television Award come miglior attore. Coltrane ha poi acquisito importanza nazionale interpretando lo psicologo criminale Dr. Eddie "Fitz" Fitzgerald nella serie televisiva di ITV Cracker (1993-2006), un ruolo che lo ha visto ricevere il British Academy Television Award come miglior attore per tre anni consecutivi (dal 1994 al 1996 ). Nel 2006, Coltrane è arrivato undicesimo nel sondaggio di ITV sulle 50 più grandi star della TV, votato dal pubblico. Nel 2016 ha recitato nella serie in quattro parti di Channel 4 National Treasure al fianco di Julie Walters, un ruolo per il quale ha ricevuto una nomination al British Academy Television Award.

Coltrane è apparso in due film per la Handmade Films di George Harrison: il neo-noir Mona Lisa (1986) di Neil Jordan con Bob Hoskins e Nuns on the Run con Eric Idle. È anche apparso nell'adattamento shakespeariano di Kenneth Branagh Henry V (1989), nella commedia Let It Ride (1989), in Danny, il campione del mondo (1989) di Roald Dahl, nella commedia poliziesca di Steven Soderbergh Ocean's Twelve (2004), in Rian Johnson il film cappero The Brothers Bloom (2008), l'adattamento cinematografico di Dickens di Mike Newell Great Expectations (2012) e il film biografico di Emma Thompson Effie Gray (2014). Era anche noto per le sue interpretazioni vocali nei film d'animazione The Tale of Despereaux (2008) e Pixar's Brave (2012).

Robbie Coltrane, de nom complet Anthony Robert McMillan (Rutherglen, Escòcia, 30 de març de 1950 - Larbert, Escòcia, 14 d’octubre de 2022), va ser un actor de cinema i televisió escocès. Va fer-se famós per interpretar Rubeus Hagrid a les pel·lícules de Harry Potter.

羅彼·考特拉尼，英國演員，畢業於格拉斯哥藝術學校，主修美術和電影學，他特有的英倫帥男氣質使他很快進入到好萊塢發展，可以出演了很多部 007 影片，後來也成為了《哈利·波特》系列的主要演員之一。扮演了霍格沃茨深受歡迎的看守魯伯·海格，這位保護神奇生物課的老師也是哈利、羅恩和赫敏的好朋友。

考特拉尼是英國最多產且最受尊敬的影視演員之一，他在逾三十年的演藝生涯中多次獲獎。迄今為止，他在一段輝煌的電影生涯中曾出演過 40 多部電影，包括最近在《盜海豪情 12 瞞徒》中扮演松井。當然他也參演《哈利波特：神秘的魔法石》、《哈利波特：消失的密室》、《哈利波特：火盃的考驗》、《哈利波特：鳳凰會的密令》、《哈利波特：混血王子的背叛》、《哈利·波特與死亡聖器（上）》、《哈利·波特與死亡聖器（下）》。他曾憑《哈利波特：神秘的魔法石》獲得過英國電影電視藝術學院獎和倫敦影評人協會獎的最佳配角提名，並獲得過蘇格蘭電影最佳男演員獎。客串黑爵士第三季中的一個角色.
data.name: 羅彼·考特拉尼
